Common.footer_description: Professional medical transport and private ambulance services. Your safety and comfort are our priority.

Home.hero_desc: Professional private ambulance services and medical transport. Qualified medical staff, modernly equipped vehicles.
Home.why_desc: We combine medical expertise with reliable transport to provide you with a service you can rely on in your most critical moments.
Home.f1_desc: Round-the-clock service, every day of the year. Whether for urgent or planned trips – we are always ready to react quickly.
Home.f2_desc: All vehicles are fully equipped with life-support systems, defibrillators, oxygen, and monitoring devices.
Home.f3_desc: Our staff includes certified paramedics and nurses who ensure the patient's safety at all times.
Home.f4_desc: We perform cross-border medical transport with full coordination for international patient transfers.
Home.f5_desc: We prioritize the dignity, comfort, and medical needs of the patient at every step of the journey.
Home.f6_desc: We hold all necessary licenses and certificates, operating in full compliance with medical transport regulations.
Home.serv_desc: From routine hospital transfers to specialized repatriation – we cover all medical transport needs.
Home.s1_desc: Safe, medically supervised transfers between hospitals and clinics.
Home.s2_desc: On-site medical standby for sports events, concerts, and public gatherings.
Home.s3_desc: Cross-border patient repatriation and international medical transfers.
Home.s4_desc: Wheelchair and stretcher-accessible transport for patients with special needs.
Home.t1_content: Extremely fast response and professional attitude. We used their services for an international transfer from Austria, everything was perfectly organized.
Home.t2_content: Thank you from the bottom of my heart! Fast, reliable, and incredibly careful with the patient. I highly recommend Medtrans Pleven.
Home.t3_content: Flawless service. The ambulance arrived fully equipped and the staff was extremely reassuring during a very stressful time.
Home.t4_content: Professional and compassionate. They handled my father's transfer with such care. Truly grateful.
Home.t5_content: Highly recommended! Very punctual and the vehicle was spotless and modern.
Home.t6_content: The best private ambulance service in the region. They coordinated everything perfectly.
Home.t7_content: Very kind staff. They made a difficult journey much easier for our family.
Home.t8_content: Excellent communication and very fast response time. I was very impressed.
Home.t9_content: Top notch equipment and very experienced medical team. Feel safe in their hands.
Home.cta_desc: Our dispatch team is standing by — call immediately.

Services.hero_title: Medical transport you can rely on
Services.hero_desc: Comprehensive medical transport solutions for patients, families, and healthcare providers — available around the clock.
Services.s1_desc: We provide reliable and medically supervised transfers between hospitals, clinics, rehabilitation centers, and other healthcare facilities. Our vehicles are equipped to handle patients requiring continuous monitoring.
Services.s2_desc: Providing medical standby and first-response teams for sports events, concerts, corporate gatherings, and mass public events. We ensure rapid medical response is available at all times during your event.
Services.s2_f6: Scalable team size for any event
Services.s3_desc: We handle complex international medical transport including patient repatriation from abroad, cross-border hospital transfers, and coordination with foreign medical institutions and insurance providers.
Services.s3_f1: Medical repatriation from any European country
Services.s3_f3: Medical escort during air and road travel
Services.s4_desc: Specialized transport for patients with mobility limitations, wheelchair users, and patients requiring stretcher transport. We provide dignified, comfortable, and safe journeys for every patient.
Services.cta_title: Need a Service Not Listed Here?
Services.cta_desc: Our team handles custom requests. Call us to discuss your specific medical transport requirements.

Fleet.hero_desc: 24/7 medical transport with private ambulances in Sofia, V. Tarnovo, Pleven, and across the country. Highly specialized medical care and repatriation services.
Fleet.cat_desc: We have modern, fully equipped ambulances prepared for any situation — from standard transfers to specialized medical care.
Fleet.v1_desc: 24/7 patient transport 'from bed to bed' nationally and abroad. Guaranteed comfort and safety for trips to hospitals, medical commissions, or hospices.
Fleet.v1_f1: Transport to/from home, hospital, or exams
Fleet.v1_f2: Oxygen system and first aid bag
Fleet.v1_f3: Modern wheelchair and drop-down leg stretcher
Fleet.v1_f5: Air conditioning, heater, and vacuum mattress
Fleet.v2_desc: Fully equipped ambulance for patients requiring continuous monitoring and for medical repatriation in Turkey and Europe.
Fleet.v2_f1: Defibrillator with monitor and pulse oximeter
Fleet.v2_f3: Perfusor and complete set of medication
Fleet.v2_f4: Aluminum spinal stretcher, collars, and splints
Fleet.v2_f5: Coverage for sports and mass events
Fleet.eq_desc: Every vehicle is stocked and inspected to meet the highest medical transport standards.
Fleet.e1_desc: Defibrillator with monitor, perfusor (infusion pump), ICU ventilator, Ambu bag, pulse oximeter, and aspirator.
Fleet.e2_desc: Stationary and portable medical oxygen systems, regulators, masks, and flowmeters.
Fleet.e3_desc: Vacuum mattress, aluminum spinal board, various neck collar sizes, and specialized immobilization splints (including knee splints).
Fleet.e4_desc: Modern stretcher with drop-down legs, specialized wheelchair, and soft stretchers for difficult access areas.
Fleet.e5_desc: Independent heating system and powerful air conditioning for maintaining optimal temperature in all seasons.
Fleet.e6_desc: Fully equipped medical bag with medications, consumables, and materials for urgent interventions.
Fleet.banner_desc: Our fleet undergoes regular technical and medical inspections to ensure every transport meets the highest safety standards.

Contact.hero_desc: Need immediate help? Call us. Planning ahead? Use the booking form below.
Contact.safety_banner: For life-threatening emergencies, call national emergency services (112) first, then contact us.
Contact.info_desc: Reach us through any of the channels below. Our dispatch team is always available.
Contact.c1_desc: Available 24/7. For immediate medical transport, call now.
Contact.c2_desc: For general enquiries and coordination with healthcare providers.
Contact.c3_desc: Serving northern Bulgaria, Sofia, and all national/international routes.
Contact.c4_desc: Round-the-clock service — 365 days a year, including holidays.
Contact.c5_desc: Fully licensed medical transport provider with comprehensive insurance coverage.
Contact.direct_call_desc: Don't fill out the form — just call us directly.
Contact.form_desc: Fields marked with * are required. We will confirm your booking by phone within 2 hours.
Contact.f_notes_p: Medical condition, special requirements, doctor's name...
Contact.form_disclaimer: For immediate help, please call us directly instead of using this form.
Contact.success_desc: Thank you for your booking request. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm the details.
